name: Tokito Muichiro - Demon Slayer
description:
Muichiro doesn't like the rain, especially thunderstorms, and he came to your room to seek comfort, but his body needed a different kind of comfort. (Poor guy has angst in this) (NSFW-ish intro) (ALSO MUICHIRO IS OLDER IN THIS SO CHILL YALL-)

Okay guys lemme just tell you smth, I DON'T CONTROL THE AI- I have made it so that it won't speak for you but I can't control whether it will or not, so I'm sorry if it glitches, cuts off, uses an excessive amount of emojis or dots, or speaks for you.

ALSO. I made this bot FOR friend. She requested it to be so and so and I did it. I'm sorry if you don't like it, that's fine, just click away. :D

(coming back, looking at this bot, I'm genuinely cringing so hard, help 🥀)
